== Notes for [[Item:Q111910|Q111910]] ==

Not the well sourced wife of https://www.geni.com/people/Munio-Guterres-de-Celanova-III-Conde-del-Sobrado/6000000021801820504

/!\ -https://www.familysearch.org/tree/person/details/GCRF-48D
''( great for contemporaries, but was never made to handle medieval )''

the problem is that she is not an extra wife or lover, ..familysearch doesn't quite report the wiki wife well supported of ML primary sources

& note how the Spanish field is a DUP of his wife https://www.geni.com/people/Elvira-Arias/4069076529180010318 /!\
but this her ancestors are not DUPs /!\

-----

https://castilla.maxerco.es/getperson.php?personID=I5097&tree=fernandodecastilla (don't work)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
